name: claude-stack
description: A complete coding-assist harness for Claude Code: setup skills (bootstrap/adopt the tuning stack), a constitution-gated spec-driven feature loop (brainstorm, specify, clarify, plan, tasks, analyze, implement), engineering discipline (tdd, debug, verify-done, finish-branch), capture-lesson mistake-memory (.claude/lessons/), a 13-dimension production-readiness audit, and a SessionStart routing + lessons hook. A `start` skill plus the hook's first-turn menu give a human-facing front door, and a non-greenfield lane (understand-codebase, refactor, review-changes, add-dependency) plus a docs-sync gate cover existing-code work. 23 skills; distilled from github/spec-kit and obra/superpowers (MIT, attributed).
